rulings.Case Title: DAVID J. PALOMARES VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, December 14, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel defendant General Electric Co.¿s deposition and production of documents or tangible things is granted in part. The scope of the deposition and document requests is limited to 1962 through 1972 and defendant¿s facilities located in or within ten miles of Burlingame. = (220/HEK)
